It Ends With Us (2024)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $148,518,266Details
International Box Office $201,204,091
Worldwide Box Office $349,722,357
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $691,091
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $519,923
Total $1,211,014
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Though coming from a complicated past, Lily Bloom has always known the life she wants. While living in Boston, she meets neurosurgeon Ryle Kincaid and believes she may very well have found her soul mate. Soon, however, questions arise about their relationship, and to complicate matters her high school love interest, Atlas Corrigan, comes back into the picture, putting her relationship with Ryle in jeopardy.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$50,016,652 (33.7% of total gross)
Legs:2.97 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:42.5% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$25,000,000 (worldwide box office is 14.0 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,611 opening theaters/3,839 max. theaters, 6.1 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $157,053,804

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: August 9th, 2024 (Wide) by Sony Pictures
International Releases: August 7th, 2024 (Wide) (Finland)
August 7th, 2024 (Wide) (Belgium)
August 7th, 2024 (Wide), released as Romper el Círculo (Mexico)
August 8th, 2024 (Wide) (Australia)
August 8th, 2024 (Wide) (Croatia)
Video Release: September 24th, 2024 by Sony Pictures Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG-13 for domestic violence, sexual content and some strong language.
(Rating bulletin 2845 (cert #54512), 7/31/2024)
Running Time: 130 minutes
Filming location (country): United States
Filming location (state or county): New Jersey, United States
Plot point: Domestic Abuse, Dysfunctional Family, Romance
Release detail: Disrupted by 2023 WGA & SAG Strikes
Subgenre: Romantic Drama
Source:Based on Fiction Book/Short Story
Genre:Drama
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Wayfarer Studios, Sony Pictures
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

Synopsis

Though coming from a complicated past, Lily Bloom has always known the life she wants. While living in Boston, she meets neurosurgeon Ryle Kincaid and believes she may very well have found her soul mate. Soon, however, questions arise about their relationship, and to complicate matters her high school love interest, Atlas Corrigan, comes back into the picture, putting her relationship with Ryle in jeopardy.
